list.name: door
list.label: Dør/sensor
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT trim(device_name) FROM events WHERE feature = 'alarm' AND state_name = 'alarm' ORDER BY 1
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT trim(device_name) FROM events WHERE feature = 'alarm' AND state_name = 'alarm' ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (e.device_id) trim(e.device_name) AS "dør", CASE WHEN d.model_name ILIKE '%motion%' THEN (CASE WHEN e.value::text = 'true' THEN 'Bevegelse' ELSE 'Rolig' END) ELSE (CASE WHEN e.value::text = 'true' THEN 'Åpen' ELSE 'Lukket' END) END AS "status", human_time(e.last_updated) AS "siden" FROM events e LEFT JOIN devices d ON d.device_id = e.device_id WHERE e.feature = 'alarm' AND e.state_name = 'alarm' ORDER BY e.device_id, e.last_updated DESC) s ORDER BY "dør"

SELECT human_time(e.last_updated) AS "tid", CASE WHEN d.model_name ILIKE '%motion%' THEN (CASE WHEN e.value::text = 'true' THEN 'Bevegelse' ELSE 'Rolig' END) ELSE (CASE WHEN e.value::text = 'true' THEN 'Åpen' ELSE 'Lukket' END) END AS "status" FROM events e LEFT JOIN devices d ON d.device_id = e.device_id WHERE trim(e.device_name) = '$door' AND e.feature = 'alarm' AND e.state_name = 'alarm' ORDER BY e.last_updated DESC LIMIT 5

panels.title: Dører — åpen/lukket over tid (grønt = lukket, rødt = åpen)

targets.rawSql: WITH bounds AS (SELECT $__timeFrom() AS t_from, $__timeTo() AS t_to), doors AS (SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE(e.device_name, e.device_id) AS metric, e.device_id FROM events e LEFT JOIN devices d ON d.device_id = e.device_id WHERE e.feature = 'alarm' AND e.state_name = 'alarm' AND COALESCE(d.model_name, '') NOT ILIKE '%motion%'), grid AS (SELECT t_from AS t FROM bounds UNION SELECT t_to FROM bounds UNION SELECT e.last_updated FROM events e LEFT JOIN devices d ON d.device_id = e.device_id, bounds WHERE e.feature = 'alarm' AND e.state_name = 'alarm' AND COALESCE(d.model_name, '') NOT ILIKE '%motion%' AND e.last_updated BETWEEN bounds.t_from AND bounds.t_to) SELECT g.t AS "time", dr.metric, (SELECT CASE WHEN e3.value::text = 'true' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM events e3 WHERE e3.device_id = dr.device_id AND e3.feature = 'alarm' AND e3.state_name = 'alarm' AND e3.last_updated <= g.t ORDER BY e3.last_updated DESC LIMIT 1) AS state FROM doors dr CROSS JOIN grid g ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_bin('1 hour', e.last_updated, TIMESTAMPTZ '2000-01-01') AS "time", COALESCE(e.device_name, e.device_id) AS metric, count(*) FILTER (WHERE e.value::text = 'true') AS antall FROM events e LEFT JOIN devices d ON d.device_id = e.device_id WHERE e.feature = 'alarm' AND e.state_name = 'alarm' AND d.model_name ILIKE '%motion%' AND $__timeFilter(e.last_updated) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT last_updated AS "time", COALESCE(device_name, device_id) AS metric, (value::text)::float AS temperatur FROM events WHERE feature = 'temperature' AND state_name = 'temperature' AND $__timeFilter(last_updated) ORDER BY 1

SELECT human_time(last_updated) AS "tid", COALESCE(device_name, device_id) AS "device", feature, state_name AS "state", value::text AS "verdi", source AS "kilde" FROM events ORDER BY last_updated DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT COALESCE(device_name, device_id) AS "device", count(*) AS "antall" FROM events WHERE last_updated > now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id, state_name) COALESCE(device_name, device_id) AS "device", state_name AS "state", value::text AS "verdi" FROM events WHERE feature = 'battery' ORDER BY device_id, state_name, last_updated DESC
